title: Working with Words
knowledge_note: Arabic has over 300 words for love alone. Strings let programs work with all of human language — every tongue, every script.
explanation: Strings have built-in abilities: upper(), lower(), length, contains(), split(), and more. These let you transform and inspect text.
starter_code:
remember name = "Amira Yusuf"
say name.upper()
say name.length
say name.contains("Yusuf")
worked_example:
remember name = "Amira Yusuf"
say name.upper()
say name.length
say name.contains("Yusuf")
challenge: Make the name lowercase and check if it contains your name.
